summary: REQ-30 appears implemented: the Gallery images list in `frontend/src/sections/GallerySection.tsx` now contains 7 entries and does not include the removed 7th image (`assets/uploads/IMG_0541-1.jpeg` / `assets/generated/sgi-gallery-07-v2.dim_1200x1200.jpg`). The safeguard excluding `IMG_0552.png` is still present. However, two additional non-requested files were modified (project metadata/summaries).

hallucinated_features.description: Modified `frontend-file-summaries.txt`, including a narrative update describing the Gallery as having 7 photos and other unrelated file descriptions.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest only asked to update `frontend/src/sections/GallerySection.tsx` to remove the 7th image; it did not request updating repository summary documentation.
BuildRequest requested no backend changes and only a specific frontend file change; updating project state metadata was not requested.
